pyqgis_plugin.name: RORB Tools
pyqgis_plugin.description: RORB catchment preparation, control vector builder, and results viewer.
pyqgis_plugin.about: A combined RORB toolbox with three toolbar icons: (1) Create RORB Layers — layer templates; (2) Build RORB .catg — auto-name, check links, build RORB/URBS control vectors; (3) RORB Results Viewer — browse .out files, plot hydrographs, export critical events. Bundles pyromb>=0.3 for build tools — no separate install needed.
